events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a splice outside a box, in-service, on a production floor. NEC 110.14 covers electrical connections and splices. Splices generally need to be in a box. This is non-compliant.

    "Splice located outside an enclosure/box, exposing conductors and creating arc/short/fire risk",
    "Non-compliant termination/splice under NEC 110.14; connections not contained or protected"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the affected circuit immediately",
    "Remove the unboxed splice and install an approved junction box or enclosure rated for the environment",
    "Re-terminate/splice within the enclosure using listed connectors and insulate per 110.14",
    "Inspect and re-verify before returning to service"
  ],
  "rationale": "An in-service splice outside a box is a clear NEC 110.14 non-compliance: electrical connections and splices must be made in approved enclosures so terminations are protected, accessible, and not exposed to damage or arcing. Left in service, it presents a high fire/shock hazard.",
  "references": ["NEC 110.14"]
}
